app_release_notes: v0.16.16 - Results panel fixes after v0.16.15 workbook column shifts. Seating Depth Log Pos column now shows medal labels again (was rendering composite scores like 0.001 / 0.338 after the Mean Radius column was inserted). Powder Charge Log hero now highlights every metric the winning load is best in (was showing only Vertical SD because the reader was still looking at the old M2 cell instead of the moved Best-in tag at O2). When a seating depth test has run, the hero best-in tag now comes from the SDL winner (which can be best in all four metrics) instead of the PCL winner, so Avg Velocity lights up green when it should. Charts sub-tab now shows two separate weight sections - Powder Ladder (Charts row 11) and Seating Depth (Seating Depth Log row 28) - so users see both independent weighting sets. Removed the irrelevant scoring-breakdown chart that used to sit at the bottom of the Charts tab. Setup-form powder dropdown can no longer pick up stale Excel formula strings as autocomplete entries.
